title: Kaban Central
description: Collection of Vanilla+ additions and changes for: building, exploring and chatting
body:
# Kaban Central
Sometimes Vanilla Minecraft isn't enough: progression is really fast, building isn't fun and world is big and boring.  
This mod tries to fix these problems and adding some fun! It also provides some interesting social and roleplay things to make your game more comfortable.  
This mod was originally intended for eponymous server. But its changes are still helpful in singleplayer.

## Features
* **Steel tool&armor material**  
  It's better than iron, but worse than diamond. And yes, to make game more paced diamond recipes (not including chisel and trowel) were removed.
![Steel armor & tools - I mean it's better than iron!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/827e7508473a5f8acc60f5f32b92b9c9392fcee0.png)
* **Steel hammer**  
  Overpriced 3x3 pickaxe. It also converts some blocks into their counterparts and crushes ores.
![Hammer - Dig 3x3 area and crush ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/d905ce8dd9ba214d1ac9f9019e549750d9e2117e.gif)
* **Chisel**  
  It can replace the block that the player is looking at with the one that is to the right of the chisel in hotbar.  
![Chisel - Replaces blocks to the right of item, otherwise from offhand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/f18396db839c3c00e5a9b3b83a5cfd05f2f23fbc.gif)
* **Trowel**  
  It places random blocks from player's hotbar.  
![Trowel - Place random blocks from your hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/999de89889af32b60bb28ca8f83896349808ae54.gif)
* **Contorollable lanterns**  
  Lanterns that can be disabled using redstone or your hand! Just be careful - don't spam it.
![Controllable Lanterns - You can turn them off and on. If they are powered by redstone, then clicking won't work. And yes, don't spam click them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/ab532c0b062112cbffc653347484d9b9fa9e0c40.gif)
* **Redstone lantern**  
  Lantern equivalent for redstone torches. It even emits redstone signal.
![Redstone Lantern  - Yes, it gives out redstone signal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/93521e6f48ab44ed2d8852e73704eaf31d99b9a7.png)
* **Very cool in-game flashlight**  
  May impact perfomance. (This is why Veil is needed)
![Redstone Flashlight - Light up your surroundings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/fba282f05bba7b75cba30a3dc481b01b1405a227.gif)
* **Sitting and crawling**  
  Can be done using commands (`/sit` and `/crawl`) or keybinds.
![Sit and crawl - Use `X` to sit and `Z` to crawl! (Or chat commands)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/c71a1b6a66ae3a3c6871bdeee57a092c208af1e8.gif)
* **Some cool hats**  
  A bunch of them are even useful
![Hats - Some cool hats :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/ad75542eade25da2ff60cc5f367a5816b6fad34b.png)
* **Better World border**  
  Tired of generic World border? Well this mod adds additional configurable border - storm. It's much more interesting, because you can leave it but you need to be prepared: it's cold out there!  
![Storm - Barely visible barrier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/cb252166aadbae6a635737ad9ba2d2c6162c199d_350.webp)
* **World-wide event commands**  
  Do sky flashes, star changes, shakes and even more. Really useful if you're trying to write a story.
![Something sinister - New commands for server-wide story](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTZAeX0w/images/8a5bcfe12e05cd0e2302a3093ac2714f79191afd.png)

## Additionally
* EMI support in progress
* Cloth config support (for both server and client)

## Required dependencies
* [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Veil](https://modrinth.com/mod/veil)

## Compatabilities
* [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)  
  Adds anonymity cape.
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)  
  Allows you to configure mod in in-game mods tab.
* [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)  
  Adds connected textures for some blocks.
* [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)  
  Adds steel knife teer.
* [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)  
  Adds ability to eqiup banners on head.
